Part.Source:
if &PblCod = 0 //INSERT prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblCod', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblPedCod', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDta', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblTipo', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblHor', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblUsrCod', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblObs', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblSts', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblUsrResCod', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaFin', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblHorFin', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblObsFin', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblFilCod', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaPrvHor', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaPrv', '', '', &sdtLogAtributos) Else For Each order EmpCod, PblCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PblCod = &PblCod
prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblCod', trim(PblCod.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblPedCod', trim(PblPedCod.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDta', trim(PblDta.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblTipo', trim(PblTipo), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblHor', trim(PblHor), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblUsrCod', trim(PblUsrCod.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblObs', trim(PblObs), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblSts', trim(PblSts), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblUsrResCod', trim(PblUsrResCod.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaFin', trim(PblDtaFin.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblHorFin', trim(PblHorFin), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblObsFin', trim(PblObsFin), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblFilCod', trim(PblFilCod.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaPrvHor', trim(PblDtaPrvHor), '', &sdtLogAtributos) prcLogAddSdt.Call('PblDtaPrv', trim(PblDtaPrv.ToFormattedString()), '', &sdtLogAtributos)
Exit EndFor Endif
